overall.description: Game engine footage showcasing two distinct medieval-style interior rooms: a cozy candlelit sitting room with a burning fireplace and red armchairs, followed by a hard cut to a stone dining hall with a long wooden table and natural blue light from a window. The camera remains static in the first scene before slowly walking forward through the second room.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy sitting room with lit fireplace

agents.ego_description: standing still in a warm candlelit room, slowly looking around at the fireplace and furnishings

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantelpiece
two plush red armchairs flanking a small wooden table
small round wooden table with bottle and glasses between the armchairs
heavy red velvet curtains covering a dark window alcove
lit wall-mounted lanterns casting warm yellow light
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books and objects
decorative geometric patterned rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cozy medieval-style sitting room centered on a burning fireplace. Two red armchairs face each other across a small table, while warm light from wall sconces and the fire illuminates the stone walls and wooden ceiling beams. The camera remains stationary, capturing the intimate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone dining hall with long table and high windows

events.description: hard cut from cozy sitting room to spacious stone dining hall with blue light streaming through window
brief green glowing orb appears near the right wall then vanishes

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through the dining hall toward the far fireplace, observing the table and stone architecture

entered.detail: long rectangular wooden dining table with fruit and bread centerpiece
simple wooden dining chairs arranged around the table
large bowl of apples and pears with bread loaves
large stone archway fireplace at the far end of the hall
tall window showing bright blue sky outside
long wooden sideboard with pottery and dishes
green ivy vines climbing the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a spacious stone dining hall with a long wooden table at its center. Natural blue light streams through a high window on the right, illuminating the ivy-covered walls. The camera slowly advances through the room toward a large stone fireplace at the far end, while a brief green magical light flickers near the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from the intimate warmth of a candlelit sitting room into the cool, expansive atmosphere of a stone dining hall. It begins with a stationary view of a cozy interior centered on a burning fireplace, where warm light from wall sconces illuminates red armchairs and wooden ceiling beams. The scene then shifts to a spacious hall dominated by a long wooden table, as the lighting transforms from golden firelight to a natural blue glow streaming from a high window. As the camera slowly advances through the room, it passes ivy-covered walls and a flickering green magical light before moving toward a large stone fireplace at the far end.
